# starrocks_resource

## Purpose

StarRocks connection resource — SQLAlchemy URL via MySQL wire protocol (port 9030) + raw PyMySQL + HTTP frontend endpoint (port 8030) for Stream Load. Mirror of doris_resource (StarRocks is a Doris fork).

<!-- FIELDS:START - auto-generated by tools/regen_readme_fields.py -->

## Fields

### Required

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `host` | `str` | StarRocks Frontend (FE) hostname. |
| `database` | `str` | Database name. |
| `username` | `str` | StarRocks username. |

### Connection

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `resource_key` | `str` | `"starrocks_resource"` | Resource key. |
| `password` | `str` | — | StarRocks password. Set this OR password_env_var. |
| `password_env_var` | `str` | — | Env var with password. |

### Other

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `query_port` | `int` | `9030` | MySQL-protocol query port. |
| `http_port` | `int` | `8030` | HTTP frontend port. |
| `ssl` | `bool` | `false` | Enable TLS. |

<!-- FIELDS:END -->

## Example YAML

```yaml
type: dagster_community_components.StarRocksResourceComponent
attributes:
  resource_key: starrocks_resource
  host: starrocks-fe.mycompany.com
  query_port: 9030
  http_port: 8030
  database: analytics
  username: dagster_runner
  password_env_var: STARROCKS_PASSWORD
```
